600 W Main St, Waxahachie, TX 75165, USA

At the house next door to Sims Library, one of the property’s trees has a substantial mustang grapevine. Hangs directly over the sidewalk. Good yield within reach but most ideal with a ladder. Access: Private but overhanging. Falling Fruit season: June-July.
Falling Fruit access: Private but overhanging.
Getzendaner Park, W Main, Waxahachie, TX
Pecan trees scattered throughout the park.  2014 is a bad year for pecans - some trees have good pecans and some are totally bad. Access: Public. Falling Fruit season: September-December.
